positive: A detailed, whimsical illustration of bioluminescent mushrooms and forest berries arranged in a seamless, repeating pattern. Cottagecore style, soft pastel color palette, intricate line work, watercolor texture, deep emerald and dusty rose tones, highly decorative, botanical art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh lines, photographic, photorealistic, clutter, messy
